description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the adoptopenjdk/openjdk8-openj9:alpine Docker image and defining two stages: test and publish, with a GRADLE_OPTS variable set to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. In the test stage add a test job that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the local .gradle directory, makes gradlew executable, caches the build and .gradle directories, runs './gradlew check --no-daemon', makes './scripts/coverage.sh' executable and runs it, and always uploads JUnit XML reports matching ./*/build/test-results/test/TEST-*.xml as artifacts. In the publish stage add a bintray:publish job that also sets GRADLE_USER_HOME, makes gradlew executable, caches the same paths, runs './gradlew bintrayUpload', and is configured to run only for Git tags. No additional services are required.
